text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her debut race behind us, it's time to decide
on Air Groove's next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The most fitting race for the Empress would be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume who conquers the Hanshin
Juvenile Fillies is crowned as the queen of the
junior year. What race could be a better fit for Air
Groove?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, I wonder what Air Groove's own
take is. I head out to find her and ask.

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
I've finished checking the academy equipment,
Vice President. Here's the list I compiled.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. You can leave the remaining checks
to me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Next on the agenda is to sort the
documents in the student council office.
choice_data_list: Looks like you're hard at work.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Unless the matter is urgent, can you leave me be?
I need to organize some documents in the student
council office.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to talk to Air Groove about our future
plans as soon as possible, so I decide to help her
clear her schedule.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You want to help so that I finish up quicker?
...Heh. You're getting better at this.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Enough dawdling, then. Let's get to the student
council office. If you insist on helping, I'm going
to work you to the bone.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh? So we have a guest. I'm sorry for not being
able to prepare some tea.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I brought my trainer to help with organizing the
documents. I assume it won't be a problem?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. The timing could not be better, in
fact.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A member of the groundskeeping committee was
looking for you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She seemed quite on edge. Would you mind
talking to her directly?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
While you attend to that, I will help your trainer
work through these documents.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
While you attend to that, I will help your trainer
work through these documents.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. I think I know what the issue might be. I'll
head out now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an unexpected turn of events, I'm left alone
with Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very well—shall we get started?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Symboli Rudolf's remarkably deft
handling, we get through what seemed like a
mountain of documents far quicker than I
expected.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You have my thanks. I'm glad we were able to
finish before Air Groove returned.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"Letting" you help, you say? Interesting. That
speaks volumes about your relationship.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which... There's something I would
like to ask you regarding Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (President?)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(What could those two possibly be talking
about?)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As you know, Air Groove works passionately,
both in the performance of her student council
administrative tasks and also in caring for the
younger students.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, she performed splendidly at her
debut and spares no effort in achieving her own
goals.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I imagine that she will continue to work tirelessly
for other Umamusume while also keeping herself
disciplined as she aims for ever greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is a path paved with thorns. One in which it is
all too possible to stumble along the way.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You watch over her from a closer vantage than
anyone else. As such, I'd like to ask you...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is Air Groove pushing herself too hard?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's query is accompanied by an
intense stare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under her gaze, I remember what Air Groove said
after her debut...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This bears repeating—don't get lax. And...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Stay with me, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As her trainer, there is only one answer to give.
choice_data_list: I believe in the path Air Groove is walking.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
True strength can move mountains, as they say.
You and Air Groove are more alike than I
realized.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My apologies if I overstepped. Thank you again
for your help today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will tell Air Groove that you have returned to
your office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as bidden, I head back to my office to wait
for Air Groove, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
choice_data_list: Oh, hey—when did you get here?
Oh, hey—when did you get here?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's... not important. You wished to discuss our
plans, did you not?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I want to take on the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll seize victory and be queen of the junior year.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I manage that, then... the president's anxieties
will be assuaged.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If she's worried about me, then that means I'm not
up to my ideal standards as the Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize that Air Groove must have overheard my
conversation with Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But looking at the troubled expression on her
face, I feel it may not be the time to pry. Right
now, I have to do my job as her trainer.
choice_data_list: I was thinking the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. Looks like you understand me somewhat.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'd like to talk about your behavior today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You... helped me out, in your own way. I suppose
I owe you my thanks.
choice_data_list: You can count on me anytime.
You can count on me anytime.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Let's not be foolish, now. You might be
giving yourself too much credit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is to win the Hanshin Juvenile
Fillies and make Air Groove the queen of the
junior year!
